label: Filth properties
description: Properties for filth things controlling age-out behavior, cleaning cost, rain washing, and appearance.

cleaningWorkToReduceThickness.label: Cleaning work to reduce thickness
cleaningWorkToReduceThickness.description: Work ticks required to reduce this filth's thickness by one unit.

growthRate.label: Growth rate
growthRate.description: Thickness units added per game day by accumulation. 0 means no growth.

rainWashes.label: Rain washes
rainWashes.description: Whether rain gradually removes this filth from outdoor cells.

maxThickness.label: Max thickness
maxThickness.description: Maximum thickness this filth can accumulate to before new additions are dropped.

pinSize.label: Pin size
pinSize.description: Size multiplier for the filth graphic when rendered as a map-mesh pin.

drawColor.label: Draw color
drawColor.description: RGBA color override for this filth's graphic.

spreadToAdjacentRooms.label: Spread to adjacent rooms
spreadToAdjacentRooms.description: If true, high-thickness filth can spread into neighboring room cells.

placementMask.label: Placement mask
placementMask.description: List of terrain affordance tags controlling which terrain types accept this filth.
